title: ziziphus oxyphylla var. oxyphylla
intro: Ziziphus oxyphylla var. oxyphylla, also known as the five-angled jujube, is a small deciduous shrub or tree native to southern China, Taiwan, and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Ziziphus oxyphylla var. oxyphylla include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and promoting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
